prompt:
A vented plastic laboratory bottle containing concentrated hydrochloric acid, shown upright on a chemical-resistant bench with secondary containment nearby. The bottle should look professional and safety-conscious, with a plain cap and simple industrial form, while avoiding any readable branding or hazard text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future lab aesthetic: soft task lighting, realistic plastic and reflection textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the bottle centered and uncluttered so it works clearly as a DSPACE reagent inventory icon.
